title: Super Strong Fully Magnetic Learner Plates, Red L-Plate, 180mm x 180mm, Pack of 2
features: SUPER STRONG MAGNETIC HOLD: Fully magnetic learner plates with powerful magnets ensure secure attachment to your vehicle without slipping or falling off during driving
PACK OF 2: Includes 2 red L-plates so you can display them on both the front and rear of your vehicle as required by UK driving regulations
STANDARD SIZE: Each plate measures 180mm x 180mm, meeting the legal size requirements for learner driver plates in the United Kingdom
EASY APPLICATION: Simply place the magnetic plates on any metal surface of your vehicle - no adhesives, suction cups, or clips required for quick and hassle-free installation
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made with weather-resistant materials to withstand various driving conditions whilst maintaining clear visibility of the red L symbol
description: These super strong fully magnetic learner plates are essential for any new driver taking to the roads. Measuring 180mm x 180mm, these L-plates feature bold red lettering on a white background that ensures maximum visibility to other motorists, helping to create a safer driving environment. The fully magnetic backing provides exceptional holding power, allowing the plates to stay securely attached to your vehicle even at motorway speeds or in adverse weather conditions. Unlike adhesive alternatives that can damage paintwork or suction cups that frequently fall off, these magnetic plates offer a damage-free solution that can be easily applied and removed as needed. This pack of 2 ensures you're fully compliant with legal requirements, with one plate for the front and one for the rear of your vehicle. The durable construction means these plates will withstand the elements throughout your learning journey, maintaining their bright, clear appearance. Perfect for driving instructors, learner drivers, or parents supervising practice sessions, these magnetic L-plates provide a professional, hassle-free way to display your learner status on the road.
